text.title: Stakeholder Engagement Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to maintain the engagement register.

step.name: identify
step.action: List every role + named human with stake in success or veto power.

step.name: classify
step.action: Assign power/interest; map to quadrant; cite evidence per assignment.

step.name: set-cadence
step.action: Apply cadence rule per quadrant; record deviations with justification.

step.name: engage
step.action: Schedule + run engagement per cadence; record last_engagement + evidence.

step.name: review
step.action: Run engagement-due.py; address overdue; reassess quadrants when power/interest changes.
step.decision-gate: Reject status report when overdue present.
